items.content_html: GitLab Tooling Plugin – Enhance your notes with real-time project insights, merge requests, pipelines, repository data etc. directly within Obsidian.
items.title: bulletinmybeard/obsidian-gitlab-tooling-plugin: GitLab Tooling Plugin – Enhance your notes with real-time project insights, merge requests, pipelines, repository data etc. directly within Obsidian.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian.MD that adds a music/ambiance player to the status bar to play Lofi beats, nature sounds, ambiance, relaxing music, and more.
items.title: andrewmcgivery/obsidian-soundscapes: A plugin for Obsidian.MD that adds a music/ambiance player to the status bar to play Lofi beats, nature sounds, ambiance, relaxing music, and more.

items.content_html: Auto backup of obsidian (silicon mind). Plugins, notes, assets, etc.
items.title: idossha/obsi-backup-repo: Auto backup of obsidian (silicon mind). Plugins, notes, assets, etc.

items.content_html: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.
items.title: gasparschott/obsidian-continuous-mode: An Obsidian plugin that shows all open leaves in a tab group as a continuous document (sometimes called "Scrivenings mode"). Features arrow navigation between leaves, reorder leaves with drag-and-drop of tab headers.

items.title: saertna/obsidian-gamified-pkm: Obsidian Gamified PKM: Supercharge your knowledge management experience through gamification with this Obsidian plugin.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that helps you write and edit novels, screenplays, and other long projects.
items.title: kevboh/longform: A plugin for Obsidian that helps you write and edit novels, screenplays, and other long projects.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin. Displays a word count or other statistic for each file, folder and vault in the File Explorer pane.

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.
items.title: 4Source/settings-profiles-obsidian-plugin: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.

items.content_html: An online mirror of my Obsidian vault, organizing hotlinks of art and artists. Powered by KosmosisDire's export to HTML plugin.
items.title: tadubay/tadubay.github.io: An online mirror of my Obsidian vault, organizing hotlinks of art and artists. Powered by KosmosisDire's export to HTML plugin.
